stemHtml: A pilot is flying an aircraft which is not fitted with ACARS. How can the pilot obtain routine weather reports (METARs) for specific airports?

options.a: Maintain listening watch on the VOLMET frequency.
options.b: Request SIGMET on the international guard frequency.
options.c: Maintain listening watch on the AFIS frequency.
options.d: Enquire via voice on the frequency allocated to ATIS.
